flashcards.definition: P₁V₁ = P₂V₂; as volume increases, pressure decreases (and vice versa).
Total pressure of a gas mixture = sum of each gas's partial pressure.
Amount of gas dissolved in liquid is proportional to its partial pressure.
pH < 7.35, PaCO₂ > 45 mmHg; caused by hypoventilation.
pH > 7.45, PaCO₂ < 35 mmHg; caused by hyperventilation.
